# Word Blacklist — words changed and why

*Generated by `scripts/49_build_blacklist.py` from the word-level change passes (rare words rounds 1–2, mixed inflections, owner manual word changes, name normalization). Companion to `word_whitelist.md` (words protected from change). Each entry names the replacement, the reason, and the decider — every AI-agent decision was owner-approved before it was applied.*

**2543 blacklisted words** (147 with a human ruling, 2396 AI-decided with owner approval).
